title: Elevate UI Readability: Master CSS 'letter-spacing' for Optimal Text Rhythm
tweet: Fine-tune your web typography! Learn how strategic 'letter-spacing' enhances UI readability & creates a balanced text rhythm. A must for better UX. #CSSTypography #WebDesign #UX
tip: Adjust 'letter-spacing' (or tracking) contextually. Tighter spacing often works for larger display fonts to prevent an airy look, while slightly looser spacing can improve readability for smaller body text. Always test across different font families and sizes for optimal visual rhythm and clarity.
